hero.desc: Minoxidil is the most trusted solution for hair loss. Start early, get optimal results with specialist doctor guidance.

benefits.b1Desc: Specialist doctor ensures accurate diagnosis before starting treatment
benefits.b2Desc: Officially registered clinic with strict safety protocols
benefits.b3Desc: Thousands of patients have successfully maintained their hair
benefits.b4Desc: A comprehensive approach, not just selling products

quickAnswers.title: Quick Answers
quickAnswers.desc: The most frequently searched questions, answered directly
quickAnswers.a1: Helps slow down hair loss and stimulates regrowth, especially in the early stages of balding.
quickAnswers.a2: Results start showing in 4-6 months, with optimal results after 6 months of consistent use.
quickAnswers.q3: Will there be shedding at first?
quickAnswers.a3: Yes, mild shedding in the first 2-8 weeks is normal as part of the regeneration cycle.

whoFor.w2: Women with female pattern baldness (FDA approved)
whoFor.w4: Combination with other treatments like PRP

types.title: Types of Minoxidil
types.topicalDesc: Solution or foam for direct application

timeline.title: Realistic Timeline
timeline.desc: Your treatment journey step by step

journey.title: Your Journey at Nexus Clinic
journey.s1Desc: Comprehensive consultation to determine the type of hair loss
journey.s2Desc: Dosage and method tailored to your lifestyle
journey.s3Desc: Periodic evaluation with progress photos and adjustments

faq.a1: Yes, FDA approves minoxidil 2% and 5% for women. Nexus Clinic adjusts dosage based on skin sensitivity.
faq.q2: What's the difference between foam and solution?
faq.a2: Foam is lighter and dries faster, solution is more economical. The doctor will recommend based on your scalp type.
faq.a3: Mild irritation can occur. Our doctor team will monitor and adjust treatment if needed.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.desc: Get a free assessment with our specialist doctors. Accurate diagnosis, personalized treatment, optimal results.

petSafety.notice: Important: Topical minoxidil can be highly toxic to pets, especially cats. Always wash hands after use and keep away from animals.
